chapter_title.en: Chapter 27 – The Trial and the Testing

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/165)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/165)
text: إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ شَيْ‏ءٌ فِيهِ قَبْضٌ أَوْ بَسْطٌ مِمَّا أَمَرَ اللَّهُ بِهِ أَوْ نَهَى عَنْهُ إِلَّا وَ فِيهِ لِلَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ ابْتِلَاءٌ وَ قَضَاءٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from his father, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Hamza Bin Muhammad Al Tayyar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> havin said: ‘There is nothing wherein is either a constriction or an extension from what Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Commanded with or Forbade from, except therein, for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic, is a Trial and an Ordainment’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from a number of our people from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from his father from Fudala ibn Ayyub from Hamza ibn Muhammad al-Tayyar from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “ There is nothing in which there is expansion or reduction of the matters that Allah has commanded or has prohibited except that Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, therein has a decree and a testing.”
